introSection:
Flight of the Hippogriff is a steel roller coaster located at Universal Islands of Adventure in Orlando, Florida, USA. The ride's original name was Flying Unicorn from to 2000 to 2010, when it was renamed and re-themed.

The train is designed to look like a hippogriff, a creature with the head of an eagle and the body of a horse.
fullText:
Flight of the Hippogriff is a steel roller coaster located at Universal Islands of Adventure in Orlando, Florida, USA. The ride's original name was Flying Unicorn from to 2000 to 2010, when it was renamed and re-themed.

The train is designed to look like a hippogriff, a creature with the head of an eagle and the body of a horse.



Brown track and supports.
